_meta: Recorded HN Firebase API responses for test_hn_firebase_adapter.py. Represents a 'Who is Hiring' thread with 5 top-level comments in the standard pipe-delimited format.

100001.text:
Acme Corp | Senior Backend Engineer | San Francisco, CA | Remote OK | $180k-$220k

We're building the next generation of developer tools. Looking for senior engineers with strong distributed systems experience.

Stack: Go, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes

Apply: https://acme.example.com/careers/sbe

100002.text:
NovaTech | Full Stack Developer | Remote (US/EU) | $140k-$170k

Early-stage AI startup (Series A, $12M raised). Building tools for content creators.

Tech: TypeScript, React, Python, FastAPI

Email: jobs@novatech.example.com

100003.text:
MegaSoft | Platform Engineer | Seattle, WA | Onsite | $200k-$260k + equity

Join our cloud infrastructure team. We process 10B+ events/day.

Requirements:
- 5+ years systems programming
- Experience with large-scale distributed systems
- Strong Linux fundamentals

Apply at https://megasoft.example.com/platform-eng

100005.text:
Looking for a contract React Native developer for 3-month project. Building a fitness tracking app. Budget: $80/hr. Remote OK, prefer US timezone overlap.

DM me on HN or email: indie@example.com

non_hiring_story.title: Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (June 2026)
